description: Real-time uptime, SSL certificate health, response performance, and availability SLA tracking

panels.title: Total Monitored
panels.description: Total number of endpoints being probed

panels.title: Sites Up
panels.description: Number of endpoints currently returning a successful probe

panels.title: 🔴 Sites Down
panels.description: Number of endpoints currently failing — should be 0

panels.title: Avg Response
panels.description: Average HTTP probe response time across all targets

panels.title: 24h Availability
panels.description: Average probe success rate over the last 24 hours

panels.title: 🔌  TCP / DNS / ICMP — click to expand

panels.description: Remaining error budget against the configured SLO objective (slo.objectivePercent, default 99.9%) over the slo.window (default 30d). 100% = no errors consumed; 0% = objective exactly met; negative = objective missed.
panels.title: Error Budget Remaining (Now)

panels.description: Trend of error budget consumption. A steady downward slope indicates ongoing degradation even if the site isn't fully down.
panels.title: Error Budget Remaining Over Time

panels.description: Sorted worst-first so the target closest to breaching its SLO always surfaces at the top — a quick root-cause triage view.
panels.title: SLO Compliance — Rolling Window (worst first)

panels.description: p50/p95/p99 computed over each target's own probe history (quantile_over_time) — blackbox_exporter reports one sample per scrape rather than a histogram, so percentiles are taken across time rather than across a single scrape's distribution.
panels.title: Response Latency Percentiles (p50 / p95 / p99, 1h window)

title: Website Monitoring Dashboard
